bird.name: Black-winged lory
bird.summary: The black-winged lory (Trichoglossus cyanogenius), also known as the Biak red lory, is a medium-sized, about 30 cm (12 in) long, long-taile…

relations.subject: Black-winged lory
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, small population size and hunting in some areas, the black-winged lory is evaluated as near threatened on IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Black-winged lory
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, small population size and hunting in some areas, the black-winged lory is evaluated as near threatened on IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Black-winged lory
